name: Stoneford Elena Roster
note: M20 ontology: the human player is a first-class NON-soul entity (game/player/ is its own master, the N=1 alias). Elena and Rowan are INDEPENDENT NPC soul-agents the player meets — neither is the player's avatar. The player never role-plays a soul; no soul speaks or acts for the player. Rowan is currently in T004 Bishi Town and can be activated later.
